title: Unable to install due to slirp4netns packaging
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

I'm unable to install podman from devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable on CentOS 8 due to the `slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm` package.

```
[MIRROR] slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Interrupted by header callback: Server reports Content-Length: 53800 but expected size is: 53804
[MIRROR] slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Interrupted by header callback: Server reports Content-Length: 53800 but expected size is: 53804
[MIRROR] slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Interrupted by header callback: Server reports Content-Length: 53800 but expected size is: 53804
[FAILED] slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: No more mirrors to try - All mirrors were already tried without success
```

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

Follow the instructions for CentOS 8 at https://podman.io/getting-started/installation#centos

```sh
sudo dnf -y module disable container-tools
sudo dnf -y install 'dnf-command(copr)'
sudo dnf -y copr enable rhcontainerbot/container-selinux
sudo curl -L -o /etc/yum.repos.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable.repo https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/CentOS_8/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable.repo
sudo dnf -y install podman
```

**Describe the results you received:**

```
Last metadata expiration check: 0:00:10 ago on Tue 19 Jan 2021 05:11:12 PM UTC.                              
Dependencies resolved.
==============================================================================================================
 Package                 Architecture   Version                Repository                                Size
==============================================================================================================
Installing:
 podman                  x86_64         2.2.1-1.el8            devel_kubic_libcontainers_stable          23 M
Installing dependencies:
 dnsmasq                 x86_64         2.79-13.el8            appstream                                318 k
 libslirp                x86_64         4.3.1-2.el8            devel_kubic_libcontainers_stable          66 k
Installing weak dependencies:
 catatonit               x86_64         0.1.5-1.el8            devel_kubic_libcontainers_stable         288 k
 libvarlink-util         x86_64         19-3.el8               devel_kubic_libcontainers_stable          51 k
 podman-plugins          x86_64         2.2.1-1.el8            devel_kubic_libcontainers_stable         2.4 M
 slirp4netns             x86_64         1.1.8-1.el8            devel_kubic_libcontainers_stable          53 k

Transaction Summary
==============================================================================================================
Install  7 Packages

Total size: 26 M
Total download size: 53 k
Installed size: 74 M
Downloading Packages:
[SKIPPED] dnsmasq-2.79-13.el8.x86_64.rpm: Already downloaded
[SKIPPED] catatonit-0.1.5-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Already downloaded
[SKIPPED] libslirp-4.3.1-2.el8.x86_64.rpm: Already downloaded
[SKIPPED] libvarlink-util-19-3.el8.x86_64.rpm: Already downloaded
[SKIPPED] podman-2.2.1-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Already downloaded
[SKIPPED] podman-plugins-2.2.1-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Already downloaded
[MIRROR] slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Interrupted by header callback: Server reports Content-Length: 53800 but expected size is: 53804
[MIRROR] slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Interrupted by header callback: Server reports Content-Length: 53800 but expected size is: 53804
[MIRROR] slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Interrupted by header callback: Server reports Content-Length: 53800 but expected size is: 53804
[MIRROR] slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: Interrupted by header callback: Server reports Content-Length: 53800 but expected size is: 53804
[FAILED] slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: No more mirrors to try - All mirrors were already tried without success

The downloaded packages were saved in cache until the next successful transaction.
You can remove cached packages by executing 'dnf clean packages'.
Error: Error downloading packages:
  Cannot download x86_64/slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.el8.x86_64.rpm: All mirrors were tried
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Vagrant `box 'generic/centos8' version '3.1.22'`


Tried just now on a fresh centos8 env, and worked just fine for me. I suspect it might be a case of bad mirror or stale dnf metadata.

How about you do `dnf clean all` and then retry installing?
I'll close this, please reopen if you still see this issue.

I'm getting the error consistently on fuse-overlayfs now -- I don't have the option to re-open -- should I create a new issue?
